title: The Good, the Bad, the Hungry
original_title: The Good, The Bad, The Hungry
overview: Two rivals address the years of animosity that defined their careers and their shared dream of achieving greatness on the world’s biggest stage: the Nathan’s Hot Dog Eating Contest.
